title: Raw UGC Disgust Reaction
description: A raw, front-camera selfie video of a young Korean girl reacting with genuine disgust to something on her phone.

prompt.concept: Raw front-camera selfie video, pure UGC. A Korean girl in her early 20s reacts with genuine disgust to something on her phone — like she just saw a cursed comment or a gross video. Filmed in her bedroom, no setup, no lighting, just a phone propped up or held up. The kind of clip that ends up on someone's Close Friends story.

format.platform_look: Raw iPhone front camera, slight compression artifacts, no color grading

character.hair: messy black hair pulled into a low ponytail with stray strands sticking out, looks like she didn't brush it
character.skin: real skin texture — visible pores, a small blemish near the chin, no foundation, slight oiliness in t-zone, traces of yesterday's mascara
character.eyes: dark brown eyes, no eye makeup, slightly tired looking
character.expression: real disgust reaction — nose wrinkles, upper lip pulls up on one side, eyes squint, brief 'eww' face that holds for a second

wardrobe.top: old oversized hoodie in faded sage, slightly stretched neckline, no logos visible
wardrobe.nails: chipped milky white polish, grown out at the cuticle

setting.location: her bedroom, sitting on the bed or floor
details: unmade bed visible behind her, white sheets bunched up
a poster slightly crooked on the wall
warm yellow bedside lamp light mixing with cool daylight from a window
phone charger cable visible draped somewhere

camera.shot: selfie close-up, face and shoulders, slightly off-center
camera.angle: low angle from below (phone held in lap or propped up), creating a slight up-tilt
camera.lens_feel: iPhone front camera, 1x, real selfie distortion on nose and forehead
camera.movement: very slight handheld micro-shake, not a steady tripod look

lighting.key: mixed messy lighting — warm bedside lamp + dim window daylight, no key light, slight color cast
lighting.shadows: soft uneven shadows on one side of face

image_quality.grain: low-light digital noise visible in shadows
image_quality.focus: soft auto-focus, occasionally hunts for a frame
image_quality.color: no grading, slight white balance imperfection (warm/cool mix)

prompt.micro_idle_before_reaction: 0.0-0.5s scrolling-on-phone neutral face, slight slack jaw of bored phone-watching

action_timeline.beat: Bored neutral face, eyes flicking like she's reading something on a screen below frame, slack mouth
Disgust hits: nose wrinkles sharply, top lip curls up showing slight teeth, eyes squint, head pulls back about an inch, says a quiet involuntary 'ew' or 'iyk' under breath
Holds the disgusted face for a beat, then mouth softens but eyes stay narrowed, looks back down at phone, shakes head once slowly. Whole thing feels caught, not performed.

gesture_rules.movement_style: Real human reflex. Imperfect timing — face doesn't perfectly sync, just real.
realism_ticks: looking down at phone, not directly at camera
real skin folds when nose wrinkles
no posing — body is slouched, casual

no_text_no_graphics.note: Pure raw clip. Zero text, zero overlays, zero icons, zero watermarks, no UI.

negative_prompt: looking directly at camera the whole time
